xxs.description: Compact indicators. Used for status indicators and count badges.

xs.description: Compact interactive elements. Used for small buttons, pills, checkboxes, and radio buttons.

sm.description: Standard interactive components. Used for buttons, segmented controls, tooltips, and avatars.

md.description: Default size for most components. Used for buttons, segmented controls, banners, input fields, and menu items.

lg.description: Prominent components. Used for large buttons, segmented controls, expandable triggers, tabs, and avatars.

xl.description: Content containers. Used for table cells and toasts.

xxl.description: Expandable containers. Used for expandable containers in their collapsed state.
